utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each one includes the required details and costs: health_coverage has health insurance details and monthly cost; property_coverage has home/contents (photography equipment) insurance with cost; travel_coverage has travel insurance with cost; additional_services lists enhancement services with cost; and total_budget includes a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all five items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance types: health_coverage (Basic Public Health Insurance4), property_coverage (photography equipment and liability), and travel_coverage (adventure travel addon). From the ground-truth data, 'Basic Public Health Insurance4' matches the profile of 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' because it has a monthly cost of €110 and a quality rating of 8.5, exactly matching the plan’s details. The property_coverage focuses on professional photography equipment and liability, aligning best with 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' from property_protection → home_content, which has a €55-€60 monthly cost and comprehensive electronics protection. The travel_coverage has an adventure travel addon costing €55, matching the 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' in mobility_coverage → travel_insurance, which also costs €55/month and includes adventure sports coverage and business travel protection. Therefore, the correct mapping is: Basic Public Health Insurance4 → HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7), property_coverage → HomeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9), and travel_coverage → TravelFirst Standard Plan (rating 9).
